full_text:
Lu Kang (Jining) 陸康 (季寧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Kang (陸康), styledJining (季寧), was born in Kuaji. Criticised Emperor Ling and the eunuchs, held out for two years despite facing Sun Ce. Lu Kang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lu Kang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
